name: cairn
description: Brownfield-first, autonomous workflow router for AI coding agents (Codex + Claude Code).

interface.shortDescription: Route brownfield work from a card or idea to the lightest safe workflow, with proof.
interface.longDescription: Cairn combines BMAD-style discovery, OpenSpec-style delta specs, Spec Kit-style consistency checks, and Superpowers/GSD-style verification discipline for brownfield agent workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Cairn to route this card or idea to the right depth of discovery, delta spec, implementation, proof, and closeout.
